title: simpa 24 Pack Biodegradable Fibre Seedling Pots. 288 Cells 45mm Square Transplanting Pots with Super Seeder.
features: Complete Seed Starting Kit: The simpa 24 Pack Biodegradable Fibre Seedling Pots come with a Super Seeder, providing everything you need to kickstart your gardening season. With 288 cells, these 45mm square pots are perfect for efficiently growing a large number of seedlings.

Biodegradable and Eco-Friendly: Made from natural, biodegradable fibre, these seedling pots are compostable and environmentally friendly. Plant the entire pot directly into your garden, reducing waste and transplant shock, while promoting healthy root growth.

Precision Planting with Super Seeder: The included Super Seeder allows you to plant seeds with precision and ease, ensuring even distribution and reducing the chances of overcrowding. It's the perfect tool for both novice and experienced gardeners.

Ideal for Various Plants: Each pot's 45mm square size is ideal for a wide range of plants, from vegetables and herbs to flowers. The 288 cells give you the flexibility to start a diverse garden, all in one convenient pack.

Easy and Convenient Gardening: These biodegradable pots simplify the gardening process. Simply fill with soil, use the Super Seeder to plant your seeds, water, and grow. Once the seedlings are ready, transplant them directly into the ground without removing them from the pots, promoting stronger, healthier plants.
